title: Thai Cucumber Salad
description: A refreshing and light Thai salad made with cucumber, silky dressing, and indian spices.
instructions: 1. In a large bowl, combine the sliced cucumber and indian spices.
2. Drizzle the silky dressing over the cucumber mixture and toss to coat.
3. Add the xtra vinegar, if using, and toss again to combine.
4. Chill the salad in the refrigerator for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
5. Serve the salad in a bowl and garnish with additional cilantro, if desired.
